name: test_should_select_time_into_date_time[localtime({hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, nanosecond: 645876123})-{year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, time: other, second: 42, timezone: 'Pacific/Honolulu'}-'1984-10-11T12:31:42.645876123-10:00[Pacific/Honolulu]']
